events.text: Gaku Shibasaki (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Belgium 0, Japan 1. Genki Haraguchi (Japan) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Gaku Shibasaki with a through ball   following a fast break.
Goal!  Belgium 0, Japan 2. Takashi Inui (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Shinji Kagawa.
Goal!  Belgium 1, Japan 2. Jan Vertonghen (Belgium) header from a difficult angle on the left to the top right corner    following a corner.
Goal!  Belgium 2, Japan 2. Marouane Fellaini (Belgium) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Eden Hazard with a cross   following a corner.
Goal!  Belgium 3, Japan 2. Nacer Chadli (Belgium) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Thomas Meunier   following a fast break.
